examples.text: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَابِ ٱلْفِيلِ
examples.english: Have thou seen not how thy Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Akkadian 𒄠𒋛 (pīru)der.
Middle Persian pyl (/⁠pīl⁠/)bor.
Arabic فيل
Borrowed from Middle Persian pyl (/⁠pīl⁠/), from Akkadian 𒄠𒋛 (pīru).
Cognate with Aramaic פִּילָא (pīlā) and Hebrew פיל (píl). Compare also Old Armenian փիղ (pʻił), Persian پیل (pil), Sanskrit पीलु (pīlu).
